Slug.description: Lowercase kebab slug (RFC-007 identity), e.g. gh-a, bench-a. The same slug keys MQTT topics, controller REST paths, and DB rows — no translation layer.

Connectivity.description: A greenhouse's controller connectivity as the platform sees it: online = fresh telemetry; degraded = a non-critical fault or stale stream; offline = no contact. Offline is data absence, not a fault.

ActuatorName.description: Closed set of actuators (physical-system-single.md §Outputs); the same names the MQTT and controller-rest contracts use. Kept as a local copy rather than cross-contract $ref, matching this contract's convention for shared definitions.

error.description: Human-readable description of what went wrong.

ValidationError.description: A rejected write, naming the field and the bound it violated — the same shape the controller REST contract returns and the platform relays when a setpoint is refused (RFC-005).

bound.description: The violated constraint (e.g. "0..100" or "must be < humidity_high_pct").
